productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Vespa Pk Mid Black Casual Shoes
description: With a classic leather build and featuring a Vespa monogram graphic on the outsole, the Vespa PK Mid from adidas originals is a vintage shoe with preppy-inspired details. UpperFull grain leather upper with patented adidas 3-Stripes on the sidesLacing system for a snug, customised FitPerforated and padded collar for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMid fit for better ankle protectionMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style OutsoleTPR outsole with Vespa monogram graphic grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careClean the upper using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
